description: Inkling-NVFP4 vLLM SERVING manifest — PREPARED, PARKED (enabled:false). Conforms to validateNebiusManifest (parked-with-unbound-digests is valid). Every reproducibility binding below is a REQUIRED-AT-PIN slot: it MUST be filled from the OFFICIAL Thinking Machines checkpoint + OFFICIAL vLLM recipe at bring-up. Empty '' here is NOT a fabricated value — it is an explicit unbound pin that keeps the cell inert until a real launch pins it. No hashes are invented in this file.

inkling.note: Extension block. All REQUIRED_AT_PIN fields are empty by design; a bring-up fills them from the official sources and flips enabled:true ONLY when imageSha256/codeSha256/modelChecksumSha256 are real 64-hex bindings (validateNebiusManifest enforces this).

model.revision: REQUIRED_AT_PIN (exact commit, never a floating branch/tag)

packagePins.note: REQUIRED_AT_PIN — exact pip freeze / lock digest for vllm + deps

launchArgs.note: REQUIRED_AT_PIN — copy verbatim from the official vLLM NVFP4 recipe; do not improvise

hardware.preference: private B200/GB200-compatible topology supported by the official recipe
hardware.quotaSource: Peter's Nebius account (NOT inspected this round — no credentials in this lane)

isolation.aumlokPhraseOrKey: NONE — the cell never receives phrase/key material
isolation.githubWrite: NONE — outputs are pr-only candidates via the owner path
isolation.publicEndpoint: NONE — no public unauthenticated endpoint; loopback/private topology only
